General.Name: CLSA Premium Ltd
General.Description: Top Eminent Healthcare Group Limited, an investment holding company, sells healthcare products and other services in Australia, Hong Kong, and New Zealand. It operates through Healthcare Products and Margin Dealing segments. The company also offers leveraged foreign exchange trading, commodity and index trading, and other trading services. Top Eminent Healthcare Group Limited was formerly known as CLSA Premium Limited and changed its name to Top Eminent Healthcare Group Limited in May 2025. Top Eminent Healthcare Group Limited was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. As of April 1, 2025, Top Eminent Healthcare Group Limited operates as a subsidiary of Beijing Tong Ren Tang (Cayman) Limited.
General.Address: Central Plaza, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
